name: Rain of Gold
description: High-coherence negentropic data overlay showing vacuum-energy flux concentrations across the cosmic web.

physics.description: Regions where vacuum-energy flux is most concentrated, appearing as 'gold' overlays on standard galactic distribution.
physics.mechanism: High-coherence data points that deviate from standard model predictions, indicating localized negentropic processes.
physics.interpretation: Where gold intensifies, the vacuum-energy flux is denser — these are regions of enhanced cosmic coherence.

visualization.description: Gold particles/rain falling onto the cosmic web, concentrating at nodes and along filaments where vacuum-energy flux is highest.
effects: Intensity scales with local coherence value
Flow lines showing vacuum-energy current directions
Temporal animation showing gold accumulation over cosmic time

legend.low: Sparse gold dust — background vacuum energy
legend.peak: Gold nodes — maximum vacuum-energy flux density

scientific_basis.hypothesis: Vacuum-energy flux concentrations correlate with regions of enhanced cosmic coherence, visible as deviations from standard model predictions.
scientific_basis.observable: Gold overlay intensity and distribution pattern
